circle-sketch.content:
export const COR_CIRCLE_SKETCH_DEFAULT: Required<ICorCircleSketchProps> = {
  color: 'base-500',
  strokeWidth: 3,
  rotation: -2,
  animated: true,
  animationDuration: 900,
  dashed: false,
  double: true,
  topPx: 12,
  leftPx: 14,
};
